name: get_channel_history
description: Fetch message history from a Slack channel. Retrieve messages, timestamps, sender information, and message content within a specified timeframe.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The channel ID to fetch history from.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of messages to return. Default is 100, maximum is 999.

parameters.name: oldest
parameters.description: Start of time range as Unix timestamp or number. Messages after this time will be included.

parameters.name: latest
parameters.description: End of time range as Unix timestamp or number. Messages before this time will be included.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching additional messages.
